Scoreboard

2026-27 Washburn Ichabod Basketball Roster

20 Tyler Salmon

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-8
  • Weight 195
  • Class Redshirt Freshman
  • Hometown Shawnee, Kan.
  • High School Shawnee Mission Northwest
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

At Washburn
» received a redshirt playing in eight games as a freshman.

In 2025-26
» appeared in eight games before redshirting the remainder of the season.
» scored 12 points including a season-high seven points against Friends on 3 of 4 shooting from the field.
» a member of the MIAA Academic Honor Roll.

Background: His senior year he was named honorable mention 6A all-state and second team all-league helping team to a second 6A state tile as he averaged 12.6 ppg and 5.0 rpg leading the KC Metro area hitting 46.6 percent of his 3-point attempts … also an academic all-state selection and a KMBC HyVee Scholar Athlete … as a junior he averaged 9.0 points per game helping team to 6A state championship going undefeated … club team finished runner-up for NXTPRO finals and won the MoKan fall league title winning MVP honors … also played tennis.

Personal: Son of Travis and Angie Salmon … a sister, Sophia … his father played basketball, and his mom played volleyball at Missouri-Kansas … will major in business.

Statistics

Season:
2026-27
  • 2025-26
  • 2026-27
